name: Flank Steak Burrito W/Avocado Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 11 oz. can jalapeno chilies, seeded, minced
4 oz Black or green olives, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flank steak in a large 4-quart stock pot with bay leaf, white onion, peppercorns, and broth. Bring to a boil and reduce to a gentle simmer.
2. Cook the flank steak until tender. Add additional broth if needed.
3. Remove from heat and cool.
4. Cut the flank steak into small julienne slices. Discard the broth.
5. In a large non-stick skillet, heat olive oil. Add diced red onion, jalapeno, and garlic. Sauté until translucent.
6. Add tomatoes and simmer gently over low heat for 10 minutes.
7. Add cilantro, cumin seeds, julienned flank steak, salt, and white pepper to taste. Add olives.
8. Cook thoroughly and remove from heat.
9. Fill equal amounts of the cooked filling into flour tortillas. Fold into a cylinder shape and serve with Avocado Dip.
10. Prepare the Avocado Dip by combining all ingredients thoroughly, seasoning as desired, and keeping the mixture chunky. Serve with burritos.
